rationale: Educ. Code §34.005 governs school district issuance of time warrants for vehicle purchases. It has no operative connection to the homestead exemption amount in Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: A school district financially unable to immediately pay for a school motor vehicle, including a bus, bus body, or bus chassis, the district purchases may, as prescribed by this section, issue interest-bearing time warrants in amounts sufficient to make the purchase.
_note: No conflict identified; the rule concerns vehicle financing warrants, unrelated to homestead exemption levels.
